title: Contract API Description
description: A JSON schema for describing API contracts with examples

name.description: Contract name, used for generated function name

path.description: URL path, supports {param} for path parameters

example.description: Request example with actual values for type inference

pathParams.description: Path parameters example. Keys must match {param} placeholders in meta.path

mutable.description: Fields that may have variant types. Array contains example values or @structs.xxx references

additionalProperties.description: Possible type variants. Use example values for primitives, '@structs.xxx' to reference structs, null for nullable

structs.description: Struct definitions. Value can be: 1) string path for simple mapping (e.g. 'body.teacher'), 2) object for custom field composition. In composition, key can be '@structs.StructName' or '@structs.StructName[FieldName]' to reference other structs

oneOf.description: Simple path mapping, inherits all fields from the path
Custom field composition: key is field name or @structs.xxx[FieldName] reference, value is source path or empty for struct refs

params.description: Function parameters. Each item specifies name and type (must reference structs defined in structs field)

type.description: Type name (must be defined in structs)

mutable.description: Fields that may have variant types. Array contains example values or @structs.xxx references

additionalProperties.description: Possible type variants. Use example values for primitives, '@structs.xxx' to reference structs, null for nullable

structs.description: Struct definitions. Value can be: 1) string path for simple mapping (e.g. 'data'), 2) object for custom field composition

oneOf.description: Simple path mapping, inherits all fields from the path
Custom field composition: key is field name, value is source path
